name: school-management-microservices
description: IT4020 Assignment 2 — School Management System Microservices

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd student-service && npm install && cd ../course-service && npm install && cd ../teacher-service && npm install && cd ../enrollment-service && npm install && cd ../api-gateway && npm install && cd ..
scripts.start: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --prefix-colors "cyan,green,magenta,yellow,blue" "npm run start:student" "npm run start:course" "npm run start:teacher" "npm run start:enrollment" "npm run start:gateway"
